TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: hawngu' Utux yalaw gi nanak hawngu Utux qaniy nanak qu tuqiy awsa' kya 'tuxan ru. hawngu' Utux sun Tayal hya' ga mutuw ktan sa kayal na bun wagi' sa gnagap cikay lngut kayal ka blaq balay ktan na hawngu', yalaw gi ini' baqiy tmring na qba' ru, nanu' yasa qu sun naha' maha hawngu' na Utux kya la.
S.PHON: ħawŋuʔ utux jalaw ɣi nanak ħawŋu utux qanij nanak qu tuqij aws~ɕaʔ kja ʔtuxan ru. ħawŋuʔ utux s~ɕun tajal ħjaʔ ɣa mutuw ktan s~ɕa kajal na βun waɣiʔ s~ɕa ɣnaɣap ʦ~ʨikaj lŋut kajal ka βlaq βalaj ktan na ħawŋuʔ, jalaw ɣi iniʔ βaqij tmriŋ na qβaʔ ru, nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu s~ɕun naħaʔ maħa ħawŋuʔ na utux kja la.
S.FORM: hawngu' Utux yalaw gi nanak hawngu Utux qaniy nanak qu tuqiy awsa' kya 'tuxan ru. hawngu' Utux sun Tayal hya' ga mutuw ktan sa kayal na bun wagi' sa gnagap cikay lngut kayal ka blaq balay ktan na hawngu', yalaw gi ini' baqiy tmring na qba' ru, nanu' yasa qu sun naha' maha hawngu' na Utux kya la.
S.PHON: ħawŋuʔ utux jalaw ɣi nanak ħawŋu utux qanij nanak qu tuqij aws~ɕaʔ kja ʔtuxan ru. ħawŋuʔ utux s~ɕun tajal ħjaʔ ɣa mutuw ktan s~ɕa kajal na βun waɣiʔ s~ɕa ɣnaɣap ʦ~ʨikaj lŋut kajal ka βlaq βalaj ktan na ħawŋuʔ, jalaw ɣi iniʔ βaqij tmriŋ na qβaʔ ru, nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu s~ɕun naħaʔ maħa ħawŋuʔ na utux kja la.
